name: seccloud
description: This repo contains a synthetic-first PoC for a BYOC insider-risk substrate and thin investigation workflow.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:py && npm run lint:web && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check
scripts.lint:fix: uv run ruff check --fix src tests scripts && uv run ruff format src tests scripts && eslint web/src --fix && npm run format
scripts.lint:py: uv run ruff check src tests scripts && uv run ruff format --check src tests scripts
scripts.generate:api-types: uv run python scripts/generate_openapi.py && openapi-typescript web/openapi.json -o web/src/api.generated.ts
scripts.format: uv run ruff format src tests scripts && prettier --write "web/**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,css,html}" eslint.config.js .pre-commit-config.yaml "*.{json,md}"
